#108 EPUB style settings

Use this chapter to test the global and per-book EPUB style settings.

Publisher indent sample. With publisher text indent ON, this first line is indented. With it OFF, this first line starts at the normal text edge.

Publisher block margin sample. With publisher block margins ON, this block is narrower and has visible space above and below.

Paragraph spacing sample one. Change extra paragraph spacing and reopen the book.

Paragraph spacing sample two. Expected: the blank space between these sample paragraphs changes with the setting.

Paragraph spacing sample three. Per-book values should affect this book without changing another EPUB.
